claimBoundary: Testnet backend probes are live and verified; external alert routing and incident transcripts remain pending delivery setup

rules.condition: primary RPC slot lags fallback RPC by more than 20 slots for 3 consecutive probes
rules.action: switch reads to fallback RPC and pause treasury-sensitive operations until providers converge

rules.condition: latest blockhash retrieval fails 3 times within 5 minutes
rules.action: route writes through fallback RPC and do not execute treasury operations until blockhash freshness recovers

rules.condition: new proposal appears outside the expected operator or governance calendar
rules.action: capture proposal PDA, proposer, transaction signature, and determine whether veto or communication is required

rules.condition: 3 or more failed finalize attempts for the same proposal within 10 minutes
rules.action: inspect proposal phase, policy snapshot, proof verification state, and account constraints before retrying

rules.condition: strict proof verification is missing, stale, mismatched, revoked, or not verified
rules.action: block finalize or execute attempts and inspect ProposalProofVerification, payload hash, and policy snapshot

rules.condition: settlement evidence is missing, stale, mismatched, unverified, or already consumed
rules.action: block confidential payout execution and inspect evidence binding, attestor policy, and consumption record

rules.condition: treasury balance changes without an expected executed proposal transaction
rules.action: stop non-essential operations, preserve signatures, compare recipient and mint against proposal intent, and escalate as Severity 1

rules.signal: program upgrade authority or deployment activity
rules.condition: upgrade, buffer, authority, or deployment activity appears outside the release ceremony
rules.action: halt release actions, preserve program data, verify upgrade authority state, and escalate as Severity 1
